name: aayu-aura-admin
description: Aayu & Aura saree business admin portal monorepo.

scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace @aayu-aura/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @aayu-aura/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @aayu-aura/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @aayu-aura/admin-web
scripts.build:customer: npm run build --workspace @aayu-aura/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @aayu-aura/customer-web
